creator: kbowling@freebsd.org
text:
Hi,

I don't have a desire to maintain an older version, we are encouraging the use of Postgres 12 on FreeBSD as the default version in the ports system right now.  I highly suggest updating your postgres install, the changes and enhancements for FreeBSD in recent versions are not trivial.

I would commit a port for timescaledb1 if you want to volunteer to maintain it.
